title: Power Cell
description: At the start of each combat, add [blue]2[/blue] zero-cost cards from your [gold]Draw Pile[/gold] into your [gold]Hand[/gold].
flavor: [red]Details for this relic will be revealed in the future...[/red]
notes: Activates only at the start of the first round of combat. Zero-cost cards are shuffled before selection.
